items.title: Consumer Price Index: Inflation Holds Steady At 2.7% In July, Lower Than Expected
items.description: Inflation held steady in July as the headline figure for the Consumer Price Index was at 2.7% year-over-year, unchanged from June and lower than the expected 2.8% growth.

items.title: Economic Optimism Returns Among Small Businesses
items.description: After peaking post-election at 105.1 in December, the headline index went on to fall to a low of 95.8 in April and has since erased about half of that decline. Click to read.

items.title: XSD: A Deep Dive On This U.S.-Based Semiconductor ETF
items.description: XSD offers exposure to 40 U.S. semiconductor stocks with a modified equal-weight approach. Click here for more information on XSD ETF.

items.title: Benzinga Market Summary: S&P Rises Following July CPI Report, Airline Stocks Gain On Rising Fairs And Falling Gasoline Prices, Intel Stock Rises After CEO Meets With Trump
AIER's Everyday Price Index Notches A Slight 0.10% Gain In July 2025
items.description: In July 2025, the AIER Everyday Price Index rose to 296.1, a rise of 0.10 percent. This is the eighth consecutive monthly increase in the index.
